forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 22 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 34.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the evening then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 25 to 40 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 36.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Marla in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 35.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 37.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 27 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 30s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then turning east to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to 21 to 26 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 35.
